title: Is there a way that i can create subgroups? If not can this feature please be added?
excerpt: the capability of breaking down a group into multiple subgroups would be huge for us.   sub totals for each sub group.   Please please please.

posts.author: NateGraceycomm (Nate)
posts.cookedHtml: the capability of breaking down a group into multiple subgroups would be huge for us. sub totals for each sub group. Please please please.

posts.author: User129438 (John S)
posts.cookedHtml: +1 for this, I am also looking for improved grouping options like folders within groups (sub groups). This is necessary for project management with lots of parts.

posts.author: jasonwiberg (Jason Wiberg)
posts.cookedHtml:
Can this discussion be merged with the following? Same request and I want all the votes to be combined, as I want this feature too!

Headers or "Subgrouping" Feature requests
It would be very beneficial for me to have Headers which allow groups to be nested under a specific topic (that could then be collapsed) or potentially the option for a main group, with subgroups. For example Dashboard on Movies HEADER or MAIN GROUP: Disney Movies Group 1: Mulan Group 2: Beauty and the Beast Group 3: Moana HEADER or MAIN GROUP: Harry Potter Movies Group 1: Harry Potter and the Sorcerer’s Stone Group 2: Harry Potter and the Chamber of Secrets Group 3: Harry Potter and t…

posts.author: TheLisa (Lisa Lacey)
posts.cookedHtml: Would be very beneficial to be able to have subgroups - there is no good workaround.
